metadata.name: Apply Cash on Account to an Invoice

description: A customer has a credit on their account from a previous overpayment. They have now requested that this credit be applied to a new open invoice.

nodes.task_description: Verify the amount of unapplied cash or credit on the customer's account.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms the customer has a $250 credit on account.

nodes.task_description: Identify the open invoice that the customer wants to apply the credit to.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds the specified open invoice.

nodes.task_description: Apply the on-account credit to the invoice.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully applies the credit, reducing the invoice balance.
